$comment: Machine-readable mirror of 28-component-and-animation-catalog.md. When the runtime enums in src/slides/enums.ts change, update both files in the same patch. Importing projects can read this file to confirm every value used in a deck JSON is recognised.

DatabaseDiagramSlide.diagram: Optional Mermaid `erDiagram` source string (preferred render path). When present, slide uses dynamic-imported mermaid with token-driven theme. When absent, falls back to `dbEntities` + `dbRelationships` inline SVG.

EquationSlide.tex: Author-provided LaTeX source. Build-time `scripts/prerender-equations.ts` bakes this into `equationHtml` during `prebuild`.
EquationSlide.equationHtml: Generated. Do NOT hand-author. Opaque KaTeX HTML + offscreen stagger overlay.
EquationSlide.termIds: Optional pinned ids; auto-generated by prerender if length mismatches.

slideContentNotes.sound: Per-slide sound override path is `slides[i].sound` (sibling to content). See spec 64.

values.name: TitleSlide
values.purpose: Hero opener with eyebrow / title / subtitle / presenter chip / ambient bg.

values.name: MiddleTitleSlide
values.purpose: Section-break interlude — dark slate + amber spotlight + ambient icons. Title-only.

values.name: KeywordSlide
values.purpose: One or two giant keywords centered. Punchline beats.

values.name: CapsuleListSlide
values.purpose: Title + flowing list of capsule labels. Most common 'tags / pillars' slide.

values.name: StepTimelineSlide
values.purpose: Vertical numbered timeline with hover-rail + per-step capsule.

values.name: StepsChain3DSlide
values.purpose: Cinematic 3D chain — active forward, neighbours recede, distant blur.

values.name: FocusTimelineSlide
values.purpose: Carousel-of-one — one step in limelight, neighbours dim.

values.name: AdvanceStepSlide
values.purpose: Camera-zoom step chain. Owns navigation via tryAdvance.

values.name: ImageSlide
values.purpose: Single hero image + optional caption.

values.name: QrMeetingSlide
values.purpose: QR + meeting block (deep URL). createSafeQrCanvas required.

values.name: ClickRevealSlide
values.purpose: Hidden slide reachable only via parent capsule's clickRevealSlide.

values.name: SectionDividerSlide
values.purpose: Lightweight divider — eyebrow + title only.

values.name: MetricGridSlide
values.purpose: Compact grid of headline metrics (2–6 cells; 1×N / 2×2 / 2×3).

values.name: TableSlide
values.purpose: Comparison table — columns + rows + per-row accent bars.

values.name: CodeBlockSlide
values.purpose: Title + single hero .slide-codeblock (shiki / manual tokens / plain text).

values.name: BoxDiagramSlide
values.purpose: Generic boxes-with-fields diagram (topic-agnostic).

values.name: ERDiagramSlide
values.purpose: Boxes diagram with auto navy-blue palette (cyan PK, orange FK).

values.name: LayoutSlide
values.purpose: Generic .slide-grid-* wrapper rendering layoutSlots[] as cells.

values.name: DatabaseDiagramSlide
values.purpose: Single ER diagram. ≤5 entities, ≤6 relationships. Theme-token SVG (Mermaid swap pending).

values.name: DataTableSlide
values.purpose: Density-capped table (≤5 cols × ≤8 rows). Header at 0.25s, rows Stagger 35ms.

values.name: NumberCalloutSlide
values.purpose: ONE animated number. Easings linear/easeOutQuint/spring; reduced-motion snaps.

values.name: EquationSlide
values.purpose: ONE equation, term-by-term Stagger. Build-time KaTeX prerender pending.

values.name: ChecklistSlide
values.purpose: Audience checklist — click rows to confirm done, gold progress bar. ≤7 items. Spec 62.

slideTransitions.reducedMotion: All variants collapse to a 150ms opacity fade.

values.name: Stagger
values.behaviour: Per-child cascade (60ms apart) layered on SlideUp.

stepMotionVariants.rotation: Round-robin by step index — adjacent steps never share a variant.

values.name: clickRevealSlide
values.effect: Navigate to a hidden slide number.

values.name: expand
values.effect: Open inline expanding card on the current slide.

clickRevealTriggers.precedence: If both are set on a single CapsuleSpec, `expand` wins.

capsuleIcons.source: lucide-react `icons` map. PascalCase name string, e.g. 'Sparkles'.
capsuleIcons.fallback: Unknown name → no icon rendered (no validation crash).

portability.assetRehome: Image src paths and font references must be re-pathed by the importing project; the loader does not auto-rewrite.
portability.validation: loader.ts validates every imported slide on module evaluation; unknown enum values raise a hard error.
